drills.name: 3ft Gate Putting
instructions: Place a gate just wider than the putter head about 6 inches in front of the ball.
Stroke 10 putts from 3 feet through the gate into the hole.
Log each make or miss.

drills.name: 20ft Lag Putting
instructions: From about 20 feet, lag putts to finish inside a 3-foot circle around the hole.
Hit 8 putts and count how many finish inside the circle.

drills.name: Chip to the Circle
instructions: Pick a landing spot and chip to a 6-foot circle around the hole.
Hit 12 chips from varied lies around the green.
Count how many finish in the circle.

drills.name: Alignment Stick Swings
instructions: Lay an alignment stick on your target line.
Make smooth rehearsal swings focusing on path.
Log total quality reps completed.

drills.name: Tempo Score Blocks
instructions: Hit balls in sets of 5 focusing on smooth tempo.
Score each set from 1–5 for tempo quality.
Add the set scores together.

drills.name: Clock Face Chipping
instructions: Imagine a clock around the hole. Chip from 12, 3, 6, and 9 o’clock.
Hit 3 chips from each station (12 total).
Count how many finish inside a 6-foot circle.

drills.name: Wedge Distance Ladder
instructions: Pick three landing distances (e.g. 40, 60, 80 yards or meters).
Hit 5 balls to each distance focusing on carry control.
Log total quality reps across the ladder.
